#1.expected: 操作要么完全成功,要么完全失败,状态一致
#1.actual: 操作失败后,集合/表/类状态不一致,可能仍存在且可查询
#1.evidence_summary: 集合存在性检查与操作结果不一致
#1.details: Milvus schema operations lack proper atomicity guarantees
#1.title: Schema operations not atomic

#2.expected: 有效维度(如1)应被接受,或提供清晰错误消息
#2.actual: 维度=1可能被拒绝,错误消息为空或不清楚
#2.evidence_summary: Milvus has incorrect dimension validation bounds
#2.details: Dimension validation rejects valid values and provides poor error messages
#2.title: Dimension validation issues

#3.expected: 搜索应被拒绝,带有清晰的验证错误
#3.details: Milvus crashes instead of validating top_k parameter
#3.title: Top-K crash on zero

#4.expected: 无效度量应被拒绝,带有清晰的错误消息
#4.actual: 无效度量被接受,或错误消息为空
reproduction_steps: Attempt to create index with invalid metric
Attempt to create index with empty metric
#4.details: Metric type validation accepts invalid metrics or provides poor error messages
#4.title: Metric validation issues

#5.expected: 保留名称和无效字符应被拒绝,带有清晰错误
#5.actual: 某些无效名称被接受,错误消息不清楚
#5.evidence_summary: Milvus accepts reserved or invalid collection names
reproduction_steps: Attempt collection with space in name
#5.details: Collection name validation accepts reserved names and provides poor error messages
#5.title: Collection name validation

#11.expected: 操作应在高负载下成功完成
#11.actual: 高错误率,超时,性能降级
#11.evidence_summary: Qdrant fails under high throughput load
reproduction_steps: Monitor error rates and response times
#11.details: Qdrant experiences high error rates and timeouts under concurrent load
#11.title: High throughput stress failure

#12.expected: 所有操作应成功完成,性能合理扩展
#12.actual: 操作失败或超时,性能不成比例降级
#12.evidence_summary: Qdrant fails with large datasets (100k+ vectors)
reproduction_steps: Create collection optimized for large datasets
Perform batch inserts, searches, updates, deletes
#12.details: Qdrant performance degrades unacceptably with large datasets
#12.title: Large dataset stress failure
